message.content: Configure the system with the following constraints: throughput must exceed one thousand requests per second and latency must stay under fifty milliseconds at the ninety ninth percentile.

content.text: Acknowledged. Will configure for throughput above one thousand RPS and tail latency below fifty milliseconds.
